message:
refactor(tui): replace raw ioctl terminal size query with ftui TtyBackend

terminal_guard.rs:
- Replace platform-specific unsafe libc::ioctl(TIOCGWINSZ) call with
  ftui_tty::TtyBackend size query via BackendEventSource trait
- Opens a temporary TtyBackend with RAII cleanup for the size query,
  eliminating direct /dev/tty file handle management and unsafe blocks
- Maintains (80, 24) fallback when no tty is attached

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
